message:
test(replay-types): add external proptest harness for recorder metadata serde (post-c62dda66)

The 6-enum recorder metadata cluster + the schema-version constant
extracted under ft-j1qjt.3 (commit c62dda66) had zero proptest
coverage in their old recording.rs home and none in the leaf either.
This commit adds 8 tests as crates/frankenterm-core-replay-types/
tests/proptest_recorder_metadata.rs:

  - 6 serde-roundtrip-is-identity proptests (one per enum, 64 cases
    each via ProptestConfig).
  - 1 snake_case wire-name pin asserting that
    serde(rename_all = "snake_case") survives — guards against an
    accidental rename-attribute revert that would corrupt every
    persisted recorder event.
  - 1 schema-version constant pin asserting
    RECORDER_EVENT_SCHEMA_VERSION_V1 == "ft.recorder.event.v1" so any
    bump must be paired with a migration story.

cargo test -p frankenterm-core-replay-types --test
proptest_recorder_metadata: 8/8 pass.
